title: Assertion `pOp->p4type==P4_FUNCCTX' failed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (value INTEGER, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table2 (value, description) VALUES (1, 'One'), (2, 'Two'), (NULL, 'Null Value');
SELECT description FROM test_table2 WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM test_table2 WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND value LIKE '2%');
key_bug_features: SELECT with GLOB in subquery on empty table
